ogTitle: Tathra vs Taylors Arm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tathra and Taylors Arm.
heading: Tathra vs Taylors Arm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tathra, New South Wales and Taylors Arm, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tathra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Taylors Arm (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tathra or Taylors Arm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tathra has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Taylors Arm scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tathra scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Taylors Arm scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tathra or Taylors Arm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tathra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
